items.title: Daily targeted research generator hit ADB API 402 for jobs and stats
items.details: tools/generate-daily-ai-insights.py generated the 2026-05-08 targeted_research item, but research_findings.source_errors includes adb_stats_api and adb_jobs_api HTTP 402 Payment Required. The queue remains structurally valid, but targeted research quality is degraded because the generator fell back to a zero-role OpenAI sample.
items.next_step: Update the generator to use an authenticated ADB source, a public summary route, or a graceful blocked/deferred target selection when ADB API endpoints return 402.
